supersede_reason: v2 specified the A52 triggered-vs-held partition on 'the fill event' without distinguishing SIMULATED-corpus fills from REAL-account fills, and without the two-anchor structure. Real exchange is_taker exists ONLY for the 5,043 account fills [2026-03-28 .. 2026-06-02], NOT the 10-month historical corpus. v2.1 pins the corrected-B-fenced-by-A frame: simulated fill is the primary object; B25 corrects fill-FREQUENCY only; the A52 real-fill benign/adverse mix is the mandatory SELECTION-validation anchor on the overlap; advancement requires simulated-vs-real partition AGREEMENT; and a pre-committed minimum-validation-N HALT prevents advancing on simulated-only evidence when the real anchor is too thin.
purpose: Pre-registered dimensional frame for the range-stack ENTRY banding test under the real-data constraint that ground-truth fills exist only on a short recent window. Frozen BEFORE CC reports the config-consistent fill count, so the infeasibility halt cannot be moved post-hoc.

corpus_binding.feasibility_check_1: GO — full price path present at 372a659; fill-reach computable across the historical corpus.
corpus_binding.feasibility_check_2_constraint: Real exchange is_taker exists ONLY for 5,043 account fills [2026-03-28 .. 2026-06-02]. The 10-month historical tape has market-taker fields but NO 'did WE fill as taker'. The 5,043 also cross multiple bot regimes (tennis_v5 -> v3 -> v4 -> 5-fix); config-consistent (validated-era) scoring shrinks N further.
corpus_binding.real_fill_source: kalshi_fills_history.json (canonical per A30/A52; pull /portfolio/fills, NOT the entry_mode log tag which mislabels ~50% of fills).

WTA_CHALL.reason: FV wired (a4659b2) but 3/7 forward-only coverage; historical gap open.

the_two_orthogonal_biases.bias_1_fill_rate_realism_B25: Does the simulated fill OCCUR as often as a real fill? Minute-cadence simulators UNDERCOUNT sub-minute touches (B25: fire_rate is the broken term, capture_per_fired is correct; limit policies 2.4x understated, policy-class-dependent). This is a FREQUENCY error.
the_two_orthogonal_biases.bias_2_dip_selection_A52: CONDITIONAL on a fill occurring, is the filled subset's forward path adversely selected? This lives in the PRICE PATH itself, not the fill mechanism — a simulated fill at depth X on the historical path inherits the SAME dip-selection because the dip that triggers the simulated touch is the same outcome-informative dip. Routing through a simulator does NOT launder it.
the_two_orthogonal_biases.orthogonality: B25 and A52 are ORTHOGONAL. B25 corrects frequency. A52 is conditional-distribution selection. Fixing one does NOT fix the other.

primary_object.definition: SIMULATED fill-reach on the full historical path at 372a659: did the historical traded path reach a hypothetical resting bid at depth X during open->T-20 (first-passage), and the touch-depth distribution.
primary_object.inherent_because: No real account fills exist on the 10-month corpus. The harvest gate is NECESSARILY a statement about simulated-fill forward paths. This framing is sound, not a rationalization.

anchor_1_B25_frequency.role: Calibrate simulated reach-RATE vs realized fill-RATE on the [2026-03-28 .. 2026-06-02] overlap.
anchor_1_B25_frequency.corrects: FREQUENCY ONLY (how often a fill occurs).
anchor_1_B25_frequency.RATIONALIZATION_FENCE: B25 frequency calibration is EXPLICITLY FORBIDDEN from being cited, treated, or reported as a selection correction. Calibrating fill-rate does NOT make the conditional forward path honest. Any analysis or ledger line that uses B25 calibration to claim the conditional-selection bias is addressed is a SPEC VIOLATION and rejects the run.

anchor_2_A52_selection_validation.role: THE HONESTY GATE. The simulated-fill TRIGGERED-vs-HELD benign/adverse mix MUST reproduce the REAL is_taker A52 mix on the [2026-03-28 .. 2026-06-02] overlap, config-restricted to the validated era.
anchor_2_A52_selection_validation.real_ground_truth_A52: Genuine maker (day-1 RUN-5, raw): TRIGGERED positive (+$6.05); HELD negative (-$8.29), held W/L maker 2/5; genuine-maker net -$2.24. Held carries the dip-selection endogeneity (A43-capped). is_taker from /portfolio/fills, NOT entry_mode.
anchor_2_A52_selection_validation.discriminating_quantity: p_adv = adverse(held) mass / (held + triggered) among genuine-maker fills.
anchor_2_A52_selection_validation.earn_the_right_to_extrapolate: The simulator must reproduce the known-real conditional benign/adverse structure on the overlap to be trusted on the full corpus. If the simulator's benign/adverse split does NOT match the real-fill split where both exist, the simulated gate is mis-measuring selection and is REJECTED — full stop, regardless of how clean its permutation statistics look.

advancement_requires_agreement.rule: Advance ONLY if the full-corpus SIMULATED harvest gate AND the real-fill A52 gate on the validated-era overlap AGREE on the benign/adverse verdict.
advancement_requires_agreement.disagreement_is_reject: If full-corpus simulated harvest says 'benign dominates' but real validated-era fills say 'adverse dominates', the simulated gate is REJECTED — clean permutation stats do not override real-fill disagreement.
advancement_requires_agreement.day1_hint: A52 day-1 already hints disagreement is live: genuine-maker net -$2.24, held negative. Do not assume agreement.

minimum_validation_N_halt.is_a: measurement-infeasibility halt, like v1's flat-gate halt — NOT a green light to trust the simulator unanchored.
minimum_validation_N_halt.binding_quantity: n_genuine_maker_fills on the config-consistent (validated-era) overlap — the fills that can estimate p_adv (held vs triggered).

FROZEN_THRESHOLDS.hard_halt_rule: If n_genuine_maker_fills (config-consistent overlap) < 25, v2.1 HALTS. The simulated gate may NOT advance on simulated-only evidence. Report the infeasibility; do not band entry.
FROZEN_THRESHOLDS.reject_power_rule: If 25 <= n_genuine_maker_fills < 55, the agreement test runs but is UNDERPOWERED to REJECT a disagreement of |dp|>=0.25 at 80% power. In this band: agreement does NOT advance the gate; only an OBSERVED DISAGREEMENT counts (it can still REJECT, never CONFIRM). Advancement on agreement requires n >= 55.
FROZEN_THRESHOLDS.full_confirm_rule: n_genuine_maker_fills >= 55: agreement test is adequately powered; agreement may advance and disagreement may reject.

minimum_validation_N_halt.derivation: Floors derived from a two-proportion power argument on p_adv ~ 0.5 (max-variance, hardest case): +/-0.20 CI half-width needs n~25 (hard floor); rejecting |dp|>=0.25 vs real~0.5 at 80% power / alpha 0.05 needs n~55 (confirm floor). Frozen BEFORE CC reports the config-consistent count so the floor cannot be moved to fit N.
minimum_validation_N_halt.day1_context: A52 day-1 genuine-maker is ~12-15 (held-maker=7 at W/L 2/5 + small triggered) — BELOW the hard floor of 25. Day-1 alone HALTS. Advancement needs accumulation of more validated-era genuine-maker fills.

fields.selection_structure_validated_on: REAL is_taker fills, [2026-03-28 .. 2026-06-02] overlap, config-restricted validated era

universe_split_logged_field.note: The universe split is a named, logged ledger field on every band row — never implicit. No statistic may silently mix the three universes.

inherited_from_v2_unchanged.net_displacement: CONTROL/discriminator: edge must concentrate at net~=0 (harvest); edge only at net<0 = drift/FLB = rejected.
inherited_from_v2_unchanged.stage_a_endpoint_IPW: 3-tier covariate degradation, stabilized weights, 1st/99th winsorize, missing-covariate legs not dropped.
inherited_from_v2_unchanged.null_model: width-preserving position-shuffle on measured marginal density; 10000 perms/tier/object; FLB drift sign baked in; statistic = fill-reach overlap.
inherited_from_v2_unchanged.band_threshold: per-cell 99th-pct + BH-FDR q=0.05 per tier per object; band = contiguous >=2 cells surviving stats AND passing headline gate.
inherited_from_v2_unchanged.held_out: purged embargoed CPCV N=6/k=2, 15 combos; harvest-gate stability scored on held-out.
inherited_from_v2_unchanged.REFUSED: Any banding verdict on UNCONDITIONAL excursion (mirror-image of the v1 net-displacement error) — permanently out of bounds.

final_advancement_rule: A band advances ONLY if: (1) simulated fill-reach overlap significant in A_INTERSECT_B after FDR q=0.05; (2) B25 frequency calibration applied (and NOT cited as a selection fix); (3) endpoint-survivorship IPW applied; (4) n_genuine_maker_fills >= 25 (else HALT) AND >= 55 to advance on agreement; (5) simulated A52 benign/adverse mix AGREES with real is_taker A52 mix on the validated-era overlap; (6) headline harvest gate passes (benign*capture > adverse*loss); (7) edge concentrates at net~=0 not net<0; (8) conditional forward-reach composes with the validated exit surface; (9) harvest stability across CPCV held-out. Disagreement at (5) REJECTS regardless of (1).
goalpost_lock: All thresholds frozen at this commit, including the minimum-validation-N floors (25 hard halt, 55 confirm). No parameter re-chosen after CC reports the config-consistent fill count or after results are observed. B25-as-selection-correction is permanently forbidden. Unconditional-excursion banding is permanently out of bounds.
